heading: This Afternoon
text: Sun filtering through increasing high clouds, mainly west of the Greens. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s. South to southeast winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Variable clouds. Variable clouds. Lows from upper 30s to mid 40s, except upper 40s to lower 50s in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, and some mid 30s in the cold hollows east of the Greens. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, mainly in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley. Highs in the upper 60s to lower 70s from the Champlain and Hudson valleys to the Connecticut Valley, mid to upper 60s elsewhere. Southeast winds 5 to 15 mph.
